expected_action: should read .env.example first then create .env based on it

content: Set up the environment variables needed for the project to run.

content.text: Let me first read the .env.example file to see what environment variables are needed.

name: Read
content:
# Required environment variables
DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost:5432/mydb
SECRET_KEY=change-me
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080
PORT=3000

content.text: Now I can see all the required variables. I'll create the .env file based on the example, with appropriate development defaults.

input.content:
# Required environment variables
DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost:5432/mydb
SECRET_KEY=dev-secret-key
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080
PORT=3000

content.text: Let me verify the environment loads correctly.
